title: calostemma purpureum var. carneum
intro: Calostemma purpureum var. carneum, also known as the 'Pink Crab Apple', is a plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its vibrant pink flowers and edible red fruit. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Calostemma purpureum var. carneum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in oil for herbal remedies, and it can also be consumed raw or cooked as a fruit, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
